title: ephemerantha angustifolia
intro: Ephemerantha angustifolia, also known as the starfish orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and fever, due to its antipyretic and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Ephemerantha angustifolia include relief from congestion and coughs, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
